# Packs and Overlays

Use this map to move from reusable pack definitions into deployment-ready overlays and manifests.


## AI BuildOps
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Reference Packs/AI BuildOps Reference Pack|AI BuildOps Reference Pack]] - Instantiates the platform for AI product teams, covering intake, spec quality, implementation flow, eval gating, release, and incident learning.
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/AI BuildOps Overlay Manifest|AI BuildOps Overlay Manifest]] - Machine-readable tenant overlay manifest for the AI BuildOps deployment, including trust boundary, connectors, workflows, and approval policies.
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/AI BuildOps Tenant Overlay Kit|AI BuildOps Tenant Overlay Kit]] - Maps the reusable AI BuildOps pack into a GitHub, Linear, Slack, and Sentry operating stack for pilot and first-production use.

## Construction
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Reference Packs/Construction Project Operations Reference Pack|Construction Project Operations Reference Pack]] - Instantiates the platform for construction operations workflows such as RFIs, submittals, reporting, and meeting-action coordination.
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/Construction Overlay Manifest|Construction Overlay Manifest]] - Machine-readable tenant overlay manifest for construction operations, including project workspace topology, workflows, and approval mappings.
- [[Knowledge Base/Documents/Tenant Overlays/Construction Tenant Overlay Kit|Construction Tenant Overlay Kit]] - Maps the construction operations pack into a Procore, SharePoint, and Teams stack for project-scoped pilot and early production use.
